eventutils.updatechecker.new: There is a new update available!
eventutils.updatechecker.config: You can disable this message in the config
eventutils.command.teleport: Teleports to the last posted event of that type
eventutils.confirm_exit.title: Confirm Exit
eventutils.confirm_exit.message: Are you sure you want to exit the game?
eventutils.confirm_disconnect.title: Confirm Disconnect
eventutils.confirm_disconnect.message: Are you sure you want to disconnect?
eventutils.config.title: EventUtils Mod Config
eventutils.config.event_description: Whether you should be pinged for {event}
eventutils.config.server_list_event_desc: Whether {event} should be added to the server list
eventutils.config.sound_description: The sound that should play when {event} is pinged
eventutils.config.server_list_enabled.ti: Add Event Servers to Multiplayer List
eventutils.config.server_list_enabled.de: If enabled, upcoming event servers are temporarily added to your multiplayer list
eventutils.config.server_list_minutes.de: How long event servers stay in the multiplayer list after start (1-15 minutes)
eventutils.config.teleport.title: Auto Teleport
eventutils.config.teleport.description: Automatically teleports you to the server when an event starts
eventutils.config.queue.title: Simple Queue Message
eventutils.config.queue.description: Simplifies the queue message for InvadedLands
eventutils.config.discord.title: Discord RPC
eventutils.config.discord.description: Whether the Discord rich presence should be shown
eventutils.config.update.title: Mod Update Checker
eventutils.config.update.description: Whether the mod should check and notify for updates
eventutils.config.window.title: Confirm Window Close
eventutils.config.window.description: Whether a confirmation should pop up confirming you want to close your game window
eventutils.config.disconnect.title: Confirm Disconnect
eventutils.config.disconnect.description: Whether a confirmation should pop up confirming you want to leave your server
eventutils.config.famous.title: Default Famous IP
eventutils.config.famous.description: The default IP for if a [potential] famous event is pinged with no IP inputted
eventutils.config.entity.title: Hidden Entity Types
eventutils.config.entity.description: The types of entities that will be hidden
eventutils.config.players.title: Whitelisted Players
eventutils.config.players.description: The names of the players you can see when players are hidden (this bypasses groups)
eventutils.config.npchide.title: Hide NPCs
eventutils.config.npchide.description: Whether the mod will hide NPCs
eventutils.config.radius.title: Hide Players in Radius
eventutils.config.radius.description: Hides all the players in the specified radius, set to 0 to ignore distance
eventutils.config.use_testing_api.title: Use Testing API
eventutils.config.use_testing_api.descri: (ADVANCED) Whether to use the testing API for the mod
eventutils.config.groups.manage_descript: Create and edit groups for player visibility and group chat. Use the Hide Players key to cycle: Group 1 → Group 2 → ... → Players Revealed.
eventutils.command.priority.self: %s§e You have pickup priority %s §ebased on the people around you.
eventutils.command.priority.player: %s§e %s§e has pickup priority %s §ebased on the people around you.
eventutils.command.prioritytop.notapage: %s§c That page wasn't found! (Highest page is Page %s§c)
eventutils.command.countname.noplayers: %s§c No players found with '%s§c' in their name!
eventutils.plustag.title: Plus Tag
eventutils.plustag.subtitle: Choose which + to show next to your name
eventutils.plustag.unlock.linked: Unlocked by linking your Discord account (Event Alerts)
eventutils.plustag.unlock.booster: Unlocked by boosting the Event Alerts Discord server.
